requirement_topic.en: Portable lithium cell safety — NI references and EN IEC 62133 alignment
requirement_topic.zh: 便携锂电池安全——NI 引用及 EN IEC 62133 对接
requirement_topic.zht: 便攜鋰電池安全——NI 引用及 EN IEC 62133 對接

summary.en: Target market technical anchors use NI-aligned references based on IEC safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and battery packs used in portable applications. EN IEC 62133 family guidance is commonly used as the technical benchmark where applicable, while destination procedures also require local conformity administration through CODINORM and Ministry of Trade channels for regulated imports.
summary.zh: 目标市场的技术锚点以 NI 引用为基础，沿用 IEC 关于便携应用中可充电锂电芯和电池组安全要求。EN IEC 62133 系列在适用场景下常用于技术基准对接，但市场准入仍需通过 CODINORM 与商贸部 VOC 的目的地合规流程确认。
summary.zht: 目標市場的技術錨點以 NI 引用為基礎，沿用 IEC 關於便攜應用中可充電鋰電芯與電池組的安全要求。EN IEC 62133 系列在適用場景下常用於技術基準對接，但市場准入仍需透過 CODINORM 與商務部 VOC 的目的地合規流程確認。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62133 (portable secondary lithium cell and battery safety) references adopted under NI practice
CODINORM/Côte d'Ivoire technical alignment references for regulated battery imports

summary.en: China commonly applies GB 31241 and related NI-linked testing references for portable lithium battery safety. The Chinese report set is useful for product engineering and internal validation, but it does not by itself satisfy Côte d'Ivoire destination-side conformity expectations when VoC inspection applies.
summary.zh: 中国通常使用 GB 31241 及相关 NI 对接测试体系作为便携锂电池安全依据。中国检测报告对工程与内部验证有价值，但在 VoC 检验生效时并不足以单独满足科特迪瓦目的地侧合规要求。
summary.zht: 中國通常使用 GB 31241 及相關 NI 對接測試體系作為便攜鋰電池安全依據。中國檢測報告對工程與內部驗證有價值，但在 VoC 檢驗生效時並不足以單獨滿足科特迪瓦目的地側合規要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241 — Portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries
GB 18287 and related IEC-derived product safety references

gap.en: Expect a mapping gap between a CN domestic test report set and destination acceptance. Safety evidence should be mapped to the target legal and conformity pathway, including test scope, pack architecture, label language, and importer declaration format. There is no automatic equivalence path from GB documentation to Côte d'Ivoire VoC clearance.
gap.zh: 中国国内报告与目的地接受标准之间通常存在映射缺口。安全证据需按目标法律和合格路径重映射，包括测试范围、电芯/模组结构、标签语言、进口商声明格式。GB 资料不能自动等价用于科特迪瓦 VoC 清关。
gap.zht: 中國國內報告與目的地接受標準之間通常存在對映缺口。安全證據需按目標法律和符合性途徑重新映射，包括測試範圍、電芯／模組結構、標籤語言、進口商聲明格式。GB 資料不能自動等價用於科特迪瓦 VoC 清關。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory to meet the applicable destination safety evidence standard where the product category is controlled, in addition to destination administrative controls.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market safety compliance under GB frameworks; not equivalent substitute for destination acceptance in Côte d'Ivoire.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use EN IEC 62133 alignment as a technical benchmark, but treat it as part of a broader evidence package that also satisfies destination administrative checks. CN GB conformity alone should not be used as final proof for CODINORM / VoC entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 可将 EN IEC 62133 对接作为技术基准，但应将其放入覆盖目的地行政流程的完整证据链中。CN GB 合规本身不应作为 CODINORM / VoC 入境准入的最终证明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 可將 EN IEC 62133 對接作為技術基準，但應將其放入涵蓋目的地行政流程的完整證據鏈中。CN GB 合規本身不應作為 CODINORM / VoC 入境准入的最終證明。
